data.title: Pan Pacific Hotels Group Elevates the Business Events Experience with "Every Meeting Matters" Campaign
data.description: The Pan Pacific Hotels Group (PPHG) is focusing on repositioning its meetings and events sector as part of its overall strategy to enhance its group-wide meetings and events spaces, with a goal of becoming a reliable partner for impactful and high-quality meetings and events. This initiative is taking place on a global scale and is being spearheaded by the company headquarters in Singapore. As of March 24, 2026, the PPHG is emphasizing its commitment to the MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, and Exhibitions) market with a significant push towards this segment. The company aims to solidify its presence and reputation in this sector through its ongoing efforts and enhancements in meeting and event services.

data.title: Jumio Completes Malaysian eKYC Assessment with Zero Findings
data.description: Jumio, a prominent provider of AI-powered identity intelligence utilizing biometric authentication and data insights, recently revealed the successful completion of an Independent eKYC Breakthrough Assessment mandated by Bank Negara Malaysia. The assessment, which had zero findings, is crucial as BNM maintains rigorous standards for eKYC vendors in areas like ID Verification, specifically detecting counterfeit MyKad instances. This development underscores Jumio's compliance and expertise in meeting BNM's requirements.

data.title: AGI Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Results, Provides Corporate Update and Restructuring Plan
data.description: Ag Growth International Inc. shared its financial results for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company saw a 4% year-over-year increase in revenue, reaching $396 million. However, the adjusted EBITDA decreased by 38% year-over-year to $48 million. The adjusted EBITDA Margin % also declined by 829 basis points year-over-year, standing at 12.2%. This drop was mainly attributed to lower Farm volumes affecting overhead absorption and execution.

data.title: Sun Home Saunas Named Best Home Sauna by Fortune and Best Cold Plunge by Forbes, Ranks No. 20 on Inc. 5000
data.description: Recent testing has shown that Sun Home Saunas boasts a 25–35°F performance edge over its competitors. This San Diego-based wellness brand has achieved a remarkable revenue milestone, surpassing $25 million. As of March 24, 2026, the company has been recognized as the 20th fastest-growing private enterprise in America by Inc. 5000.
